data.body:
Correction (2026-04-27): the prior "C3 coordination dependency shifts to c183-ed2a" comment from 2026-04-26 is now inaccurate. On 2026-04-27, c183-ed2a was split into two epics on scrutiny review:

- c183-ed2a (now Epic A — inference channel): adversarial review of inference-sourced decisions + brainstorm completeness attestation. Does NOT deliver the degradation:bool field.
- a154-98de (Epic B — degradation channel): PRECONDITIONS degradation:bool field + sprint story-closure forcing function + dual-channel ack with sample-ack mode. THIS is where the degradation field lands.

C3's coordination dependency therefore points at a154-98de specifically (not c183-ed2a). Suggested SC update for this epic: "verifier reads PRECONDITIONS degradation:true entries (delivered by a154-98de SC1) and refuses closure when unacknowledged; this is in addition to the truths/artifacts/key_links verification this epic delivers."

Soft sequencing: a154-98de's SC1 must ship before this verifier check can be implemented end-to-end. a154-98de itself depends on c183-ed2a (decision_id format + INFERENCE_SKIP envelope), so the chain is c183-ed2a → a154-98de → 6068-cb2d's coordination SC.
